title: Programming and DS - DS - Linear Probing

questions.question:
A hash function \( f \) defined as \( f(\text{key}) =\text{key mod} \) \( 7 \), with linear probing it is used to insert the key \( 37,38,72,48,98,11,56 \) into a table index from \( 0 \) to \( 6 \). What will be the locations of \( 11 \):



Data Structures: UGC NET CSE | December 2005 | Part 2 | Question: 22
